name: @prana/inference-router
description: PRANA free-API fallback inference router (TASK XX19). Routes an inference request across a PRIORITY LADDER of backends — (1) local river nodes / worker swarm, (2) free/community API tiers, (3) a paid/cloud fallback — and falls through on failure or ratelimit. This is the 'Hathor pulls from whichever nodes are live' router. SKELETON — backend infer()/healthCheck() are STUBBED to deterministic synthetic output; the router fallthrough, priority ordering, and per-backend token-bucket ratelimiting are real and unit-testable.
author: Van Kush Family Research Institute (VKFRI)
